title: Old Villager Statue
description: Adds an Old Villager Statue to the plains and forest biome
body:
This simple mod adds ancient, overgrown Villager statues to the Plains and Forest biomes.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bde7b2132134ea78199055334cf0423590d108e.jpeg)



Broken Portal: On the back of each statue, you'll discover a broken, overgrown portal.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d0c64aae226dbb3ffd6acd5efc3d3fc9aa75511.jpeg)

Hidden Treasure: A secret chest is hidden somewhere inside the statue

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2091e56eff528320ea03433e68549e8c257d55ca.jpeg)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7578bac5a5f1304065256ec4ba8dcd6a222b83af.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
